creator: che@bein.link
text:
The mentioned port is outdated. I created a patch to update it. portlint -AC says everything is fine (except for $FreeBSD$ which is ok):
% portlint -AC
WARN: Makefile: for new port, make $FreeBSD$ tag in comment section empty, to make SVN happy.
WARN: Makefile: new ports should not set PORTREVISION.
0 fatal errors and 2 warnings found.


I attached the patch and the poudriere log (coming soon)
